Fields.Name: Action Enabled - Message ID
Fields.Description: The MsgID of the menu displayed when the action is enabled.

Fields.Name: Action Failed - Message ID
Fields.Description: The MsgID of the menu to display when the action fails.

Fields.Name: Unconditional Qualified Event Flag ID
Fields.Description: Event flags for unconditionally passing special conditions.

Fields.Name: Player Animation ID
Fields.Description: This is the animation ID for the action of the player character.

Fields.Name: Character Animation ID
Fields.Description: Anime ID at the time of action such as enemy

Fields.Name: Valid Distance
Fields.Description: The effective distance of the action.

Fields.Name: Object Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Damipoli ID that is the action position of the object

Fields.Name: Is Event Execution Synchronized
Fields.Description: ObjAct Whether to synchronize the events used in the execution judgment. Set to basic . It may be set to  only when the actor is not important.

Fields.Name: Object Animation ID
Fields.Description: This is the animation ID for the action of the object.

Fields.Name: Valid Player Angle
Fields.Description: The effective angle of the player's action. Effective angle difference between the player's orientation vector and the orientation vector to the object

Fields.Name: Valid Object Angle
Fields.Description: The action effective angle of the object. Effective angle difference between the action vector of the object and the character vector

Fields.Name: Character Absorb Type
Fields.Description: It is a method of adsorbing characters during object action.

Fields.Name: Treasure Enable Delay
Fields.Description: The number of seconds from the execution of the object action to the activation of the treasure. A setting exclusively for the object type treasure box of the object act.
